nodes.name: Little girl
nodes.base_description: Little girl, daughter of the family, who sits on the bed, asks her mother to tell a story about their cat, and reacts with excitement saying WOW.

states.current_description: Little girl, daughter of the family, who sits on the bed, asks her mother to tell a story about their cat, reacts with excitement saying WOW, and is now listening to the story about the cat's origins and World Recreation.

nodes.name: Father
nodes.base_description: Father of the little girl, staying indoors, looks at the cat and addresses it as a mister demon, asking whether it is more interesting to be a cat than a rock, and encourages Maria to tell the story.

nodes.name: Mother
nodes.base_description: Mother (Maria) who finds her notebook under the bed, thanks the cat, sits on the bed next to her daughter, is asked to tell a story about the cat, suggests proceeding with the story, and begins telling a story about their cat and World Recreation.

nodes.name: Cat
nodes.base_description: The family cat, described as a cutie cat and very red, walks under the bed, meows, is addressed by the father as a mister demon, and is said to be an ancient demon who was a rock before World Recreation.

states.current_description: The family cat, described as a cutie cat and very red, walks under the bed, meows, is addressed by the father as a mister demon, and is said to be an ancient demon who was a rock before World Recreation. Its demon identity and past form are acknowledged during the conversation.

nodes.name: Notebook
nodes.base_description: A notebook that was lost, then found under the bed by the cat and taken by the mother.

states.current_description: A notebook that was lost and then found under the bed by the cat.
A notebook that was found under the bed by the cat and taken by the mother.

nodes.name: Bed
nodes.base_description: The bed in the girl's bedroom under which the cat walks and where the notebook was found; the mother and daughter sit on it.

nodes.name: Story about cat
nodes.base_description: The story about the cat that the mother is asked to tell and eventually begins telling, referencing the cat's origins and World Recreation, and told to the little girl.

nodes.name: World Recreation
nodes.base_description: World Recreation, described as the greatest event in history after which demons appeared.

nodes.name: Cat finds notebook
nodes.base_description: The cat finds the notebook under the bed.

nodes.name: Mother takes notebook
nodes.base_description: Mother takes the notebook from under the bed after it is found.

nodes.name: Conversation about cat
nodes.base_description: Family conversation where the father addresses the cat as a demon, the mother suggests proceeding, and the little girl reacts.

edges.description: The girl is the daughter of the father in the family.
The girl is the daughter of the mother in the family.
The little girl is sitting on the bed in her bedroom.
Mother sits on the bed next to her daughter.
The cat walks under the bed.
The notebook is found by the cat.
The cat finds the notebook under the bed.
Mother takes the notebook after it is found.
Mother takes the notebook from under the bed.
The story told by the mother is about the cat, including its origins and connection to World Recreation.
The story is now being told to the little girl.
The story references World Recreation and the cat's origins.
The conversation centers around the cat being addressed as a demon who used to be a rock.
The father looks at the cat and addresses it as a mister demon while asking a question.
The cat finding the notebook happens before the mother takes it.
